PolyAI support

Demo agent — content from docs.poly.ai
Retrieval mode — surfacing top wiki pages. Add an API key for full chat.

—

—
View on docs.poly.ai ↗

Settings

Demo defaults to retrieval mode (no key needed). Paste an Anthropic API key to enable real chat with the wiki as context.

Calls go directly from your browser to api.anthropic.com. The key never leaves this tab. No proxy, no cookies.
